hero.title: We automate businesses,
hero.subtitle: We're a Bangladesh-based AI automation agency helping SMEs scale without hiring more people. From intelligent sales agents to full workflow automation — we build, deploy, and maintain systems that actually work.

origin.title: Started from a real problem we couldn't ignore
origin.p1: We started Driplare after seeing the same pattern over and over: Bangladeshi e-commerce businesses spending 12+ hours a day manually replying to Facebook comments, WhatsApp messages, and juggling orders in messy spreadsheets.
origin.p2: International AI tools were too expensive, too complex, and not built for how BD businesses actually operate. We knew there had to be a better way — something affordable, deployed fast, and built for local workflows.
origin.p3: So we built it. Today, we help businesses across Bangladesh and internationally automate their operations, save time, and grow revenue — without the enterprise price tag or the 6-month implementation timelines.

mission.title: Bridge the gap between AI complexity and business reality
mission.subtitle: We believe every business — not just Fortune 500 companies — deserves access to intelligent automation. Our mission is to make AI deployment simple, affordable, and measurable for SMEs.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Four pillars. One goal: automate your business.

aiAgents.name: Custom AI Agents
aiAgents.desc: Intelligent chatbots for WhatsApp and Facebook that sell, support, and qualify leads 24/7.

automation.name: Workflow Automation
automation.desc: Connect your tools with n8n. Automate orders, reviews, follow-ups, and reporting.

webDev.name: Web Development
webDev.desc: Custom websites, dashboards, and e-commerce platforms built with Next.js and React.

consulting.name: AI Consulting
consulting.desc: Strategy sessions and audits. We identify where AI saves you time and money — then build the roadmap.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: A small team obsessed with automation, clean code, and helping businesses grow.

members.name: Founder
members.bio: Built the first AI agent for a friend's e-commerce store. It worked. Now we build them for everyone.

members.name: Tech Lead
members.bio: Turns messy business logic into clean automation workflows. Expert in n8n, OpenAI, and making things just work.

members.name: Developer
members.bio: Builds the interfaces and makes sure everything talks to everything else — dashboards, forms, APIs, you name it.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.subtitle: These principles guide every project we take on.

transparency.name: Transparent Pricing
transparency.desc: No hidden fees. No surprise charges. One-time setup, optional maintenance. That's it.

quality.name: Quality First
quality.desc: We don't ship half-baked solutions. Every system is tested, documented, and deployed with care.

results.name: Results-Driven
results.desc: We measure success in hours saved, revenue generated, and problems actually solved — not vanity metrics.

cta.title: Ready to automate your business?
cta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. We'll walk through your current workflow, identify bottlenecks, and show you exactly what AI can do for you — no sales pitch, just clarity.
